videos.title: Gemini Spark: Is Google's $100/Month AI Agent Actually Worth It?
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini Spark: Is Google's $100/Month AI Agent Actually Worth It? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google just dropped Gemini Spark at I/O 2026 — a 24/7 AI agent that reads your Gmail, runs your calendar, and acts on your behalf even when your laptop is closed. Sounds incredible. Until you ask what it actually knows about you.

In this video, I break down exactly what Gemini Spark is, how it's built on Gemini 3.5 Flash and the Antigravity agent platform, and how it really compares to ChatGPT, Claude, Llama, and Microsoft Copilot in the new agent era.

We cover the three pillars Google built Spark around (Tasks, Skills, and Schedules), the personal data trade-off that The Verge keeps flagging in their hands-on reviews, the prompting habits that actually make agents like this useful, and a brutally honest take on whether the $100/month Google AI Ultra subscription is worth it for your workflow.

If you're trying to figure out which agent to bet on as the consumer AI landscape shifts from chatbots to autonomous assistants, this one's for you.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro
00:47 What Spark Actually Is
02:34 The Personal Data Story
04:22 How It Stacks Up
06:43 Prompting Habits That Actually Matter
08:21 Limitations And The Privacy Trade

videos.title: Raising The Timber Framed Forest Kitchen!
videos.summary_source_text:
Raising The Timber Framed Forest Kitchen! Just made some handmade walnut end grain cutting boards, available on my website:
https://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

After months of felling trees, hewing beams, cutting joints and fitting everything together. Finally the day is here where the outdoors kitchen gets raised. Thank you Stevie Antoniou for helping me lift the beams and edit my videos!

In the video I’m using my pans from Kockums Jernverk, made in Sweden from high-quality Swedish steel. They create a natural non-stick surface and work just as well over an open fire as they do in your kitchen. Built to last a lifetime, they’re one of the most affordable choices you can make in the long run.
It’s craftsmanship I truly believe in, made with the same values I stand for. I’m proud to represent them.

Get the same pan here:
👉 https://www.kockumsjernverk.se/sv/kolstalsstekpannor/stekpanna-o28-cm


🌳🪵 A massive thank you to Revolution Race for the clothes that you know I am always wearing.
Get the same clothes here: https://bit.ly/4nkgMZw

____

My own website: http://www.grankvist-outdoors.com

I hand-craft my own cutting boards in the log cabin. I can only make a few at a time, so you have to be first to buy one when a new batch is released. They are made from hard nordic oak, making them extremely durable, holding up for a lifetime of abuse. Instead of having a plastic cutting board that really should be thrown away after 2 years.

I was told that my dream of selling handmade products wouldn’t work in today's world where everything is mass produced. I want to prove them wrong. My goal is to expand into other handmade products. Making a series of lifetime quality handmade goods. Breaking free from mass production, supporting our environment. Just made some handmade walnut end grain cutting boards, available on my website:

Burgerdudes Invitational [6 juni] tillsammans med Funky Chicken, Rollin' Bistros och Pom Friterie! Lördagen den 6 juni (på Nationaldagen) är det dags för årets första Burgerdudes Invitational! Funky Chicken Food Truck (Nacka), Rollin' Bistros (Göteborg) och Pom Friterie (Stockholm) kommer till Söder för en exklusiv dag med sina hyllade burgare och pommes frites.

Eventet anordnas i Fatbursparken mellan Medborgarplatsen och Södra Station mellan kl. 12–18. Kom och njut av några av Sveriges bästa burgare och pommes med oss!

Dessutom blir det skön loungehäng och kalla drycker från Coca-Cola. Missa inte detta!

videos.title: New Audi R8 Nuvolari supercar – is this the END of Lamborghini?
videos.summary_source_text:
New Audi R8 Nuvolari supercar – is this the END of Lamborghini? Audi has unveiled its successor to the R8, the Nuvolari, and we’re going to run through the key stats, details, and everything you need to know about this 1000hp hybrid.

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-05-06

Audi has taken the car world by surprise and unveiled a successor to the Audi R8 - the Nuvolari!

It’s a V8-powered hybrid that shares parts with the Lamborghini Temerario, and this car clearly has the all-new Lambo in its sights! The question is, does it offer enough to turn supercar fans away from the raging bull? Let’s take a closer look at the stats…

Starting with the engine, it shares the same set-up as found in the Temerario, which means it comes with a 4-litre twin-turbo V8, as well as three electric motors. However, the Nuvolari clocks in at 1000hp - 80hp more than the Lamborghini. All this power helps it hit 62mph in just 2.6 seconds, and 124mph in just 6.8 seconds!

In terms of the design, it clearly takes inspiration from last year’s Concept C. Up top there’s a narrow, upright grille flanked by slim headlights, and these sit atop massive air intakes. Along the side, the blacked-out air blades remind us of the R8, and around the back there’s a massive diffuser and large air vents to really give the Nuvolari an aggressive presence on the road. There’s also a massive central exhaust in between the slim-line taillights.

Although interior shots are limited, it’s clearly been kept very minimalist. There’s a large central infotainment screen, and the entire cabin looks to be covered in Alcantara. There are buttons for the gear selector, and all switches are made of solid metal. It’s simple, yet sophisticated!

Then we come to the price - the Nuvolari will set you back an eye-watering £500,000! What’s more, it will be limited to just 499 units, with deliveries expected to start early next year! The question is, what would you want to see us drag race it against? Let us know in the comments! videos.title: NO QUIT IN CAROLINA! Hurricanes Complete Comeback Win in Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final!
videos.summary_source_text:
NO QUIT IN CAROLINA! Hurricanes Complete Comeback Win in Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final! We got a series now! The Carolina Hurricanes erased a two-goal deficit to win 4-3 in overtime. For 50 minutes, the Hurricanes did not have a goal, but once Logan Stankoven gave them life, they scored three unanswered to take the lead. In the end, it was Seth Jarvis being the overtime hero to secure the Hurricanes' first Stanley Cup Final win since 2006. On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes just kept playing their style all games. Even when down 2-0 with less than 10 minutes left, they did not change from their system and won with a no-quit attitude. They became the first team in 82 years to win a game while down by multiple goals with less than 10 minutes left. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes scored three goals in 5:05 to go from 2-0 down to up 3-2. Stankoven led the way, followed by depth scoring goals by Mark Jankowski and Jordan Staal. That said, what can the Hurricanes learn from a win like this? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts from the game overall and what it means moving into Game 3 on Saturday in Las Vegas. What can the Hurricanes do to replicate what they did in Game 2, and take a 2-1 series lead following Game 3?All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Driver Made Simple Part 2 — The Swing Plane
videos.summary_source_text:
Driver Made Simple Part 2 — The Swing Plane Think of a tilted pane of glass cutting through the ground toward your target. That's your swing plane. 🏌️ When you rotate back and through, your club should trace that line the whole way. This one concept — staying in your posture and on plane — is what separates consistent ball strikers from everyone else.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch

• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Rick Shiels returns to Valderrama, one of the toughest golf courses in Europe - host of the 1997 Ryder Cup, and LIV Andalucia, for one reason... REVENGE! videos.title: Why Carbonated Water Feels SO Good to Drink
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Carbonated Water Feels SO Good to Drink Why does carbonated water feel so satisfying when you drink it?

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/4dv77v3

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, Dr. Berg explains the surprising reason behind sparkling water and why it can instantly make you feel calmer, more refreshed, and even less stressed. When carbonated water travels down your esophagus and into your stomach, it stimulates special nerve receptors that indirectly activate the vagus nerve, one of the most important nerves involved in relaxation and digestion.

Discover how sparkling water may help calm the nervous system, improve digestion, lower stress, and create that deeply satisfying feeling people crave. Plus, learn why it can feel more hydrating even when it technically isn’t.

videos.title: Google Just Killed Every Transcription App
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Just Killed Every Transcription App 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

I'm testing Google's brand new Eloquent app live and it might be the end of paid transcription apps for a lot of you.

It dropped on Mac this week, it's completely free, and it runs 100% on-device. No cloud. No internet. No subscription. It transcribes you, strips out every "um" and "uh," cleans up your half-finished sentences, and even lets you dictate edit commands like "turn this into an executive summary." It's powered by Google's new Gemma 4 12B model running locally on your machine.

In this live I'm opening it cold for the first time, putting it head to head with the apps you're probably paying for, and seeing whether the offline angle actually holds up in real use.

🔗 Download Eloquent (free): https://mrc.fm/eloquent 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: UK | 04.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 04.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: What Is Jack Drury's Future With The Colorado Avalanche?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Is Jack Drury's Future With The Colorado Avalanche? Colorado Avalanche face tough offseason choices as Jack Drury’s future hangs in the balance. Could Drury become a cap casualty, or will the Avalanche find a way to keep his energy and playmaking in Denver? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the complexities surrounding Drury’s restricted free agent status, offer sheet scenarios, and whether trading his rights could help the Avs recoup desperately needed draft picks.

The conversation heats up with debate over salary cap maneuvering, the pros and cons of prioritizing immediate championship window versus long-term assets, and potential ripple effects on the Avalanche lineup. Plus, speculation swirls as Dylan Larkin requests a trade from the Detroit Red Wings—could Colorado be a landing spot? The hosts weigh blockbuster trade ideas, roster impacts, and how the Avs can maximize both present and future success in the NHL’s high-stakes offseason.

videos.summary_source_text:
China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds China just revealed JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain built to think, see, move, and react in real time. Vietnam showed two new humanoids for homes, security, factories, and remote work, while NVIDIA gave researchers a six-foot robot platform with over two thousand teraflops of onboard AI power.

The humanoid robot race is moving from stage demos into real platforms for work, homes, security, factories, and research. The shift is clear: the next winner will connect AI brains, hands, sensors, balance, and real-world training into one stable machine.

videos.title: Elite Stickhandling Keeps Everything Tight And Controlled
videos.summary_source_text:
Elite Stickhandling Keeps Everything Tight And Controlled The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: What If Heart Disease Starts Long Before the Heart?
videos.summary_source_text:
What If Heart Disease Starts Long Before the Heart? After decades of treating heart disease and caring for thousands of patients, one theme continues to appear again and again: inflammation. Not the kind that shows up after an injury, but the chronic, low-grade inflammation that quietly builds over time. Modern life exposes the body to countless stressors, and the body responds the only way it knows how. The question is not whether inflammation matters, but how much of today's chronic disease is being driven by it.

This is a clip from my conversation on The Primal Podcast. You can find the convesation on their channel or in the collaborations on my channel.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Grok 4.3 is xAI's new flagship, and most people are leaving its best features on the table. In this full guide I break down everything it actually does — the 1 million-token context window, adjustable reasoning, tool calling, and structured outputs — with live demos for documents, coding, and tools so you know exactly when to reach for it and how to get your money's worth.

I cover the controls that actually move the needle, the settings that quietly cost you money, and the pitfalls xAI buries in their own docs. By the end you'll know precisely where Grok 4.3 wins, where it doesn't, and how to beat the December 2025 knowledge cutoff.

videos.title: The Backswing Move Quietly Ruining Your Ball Striking
videos.summary_source_text:
The Backswing Move Quietly Ruining Your Ball Striking ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=04.06.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=04.06.26

Your ball striking doesn’t always break down at impact. Often, it starts much earlier in the backswing.
In this video, we show you the overlooked move that can quietly ruin contact and accuracy: losing posture as you turn back. We break down why it happens, how it affects strike and swing plane, and the simple drill we used with a recent student to improve it.
If you want more consistent contact without feeling like you have to manipulate the club through impact, this is a great place to start.

videos.title: Round 1 Highlights | 2026 KLM Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 KLM Open Round One of the KLM Open at The International in Amsterdam proved to be a true test of golf.

Players faced relentless challenges throughout the day, battling heavy rain, thunderstorms, lightning delays and winds gusting up to 30mph as they looked to make their mark in the Netherlands' national open. Watch the best of an eventful opening day at the KLM Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The European Swing continues as the DP World Tour hosts a national open for the third consecutive week. Connor Syme returns to defend his maiden DP world Tour title where he won by two shots 12 months ago. Alongside Syme, Major Winners Francesco Molinari and Danny Willet will be teeing it up as well as Casey Jarvis and Joost Luiten who will be bidding for a hat-trick of wins at his home open. It will also be a fond farewell to The International which is hosting the KLM Open for the third consecutive year and fourth time overall and has always been a jewel in the crown of the DP World Tour Schedule. It is also the sight where Beat the Pro launched back in 2016 and has produced many memorable moments throughout the years.
Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world. 

► WEBSITE: http://www.europeantour.com
► FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/DPWorldTour

videos.title: OpenAI’s Screenless AI Device: Sam Altman & Jony Ive’s iPhone Killer?
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI’s Screenless AI Device: Sam Altman & Jony Ive’s iPhone Killer? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI is building its first AI hardware device with Sam Altman and legendary Apple designer Jony Ive — and it might be one of the biggest consumer tech bets of the decade.

In this video, we break down everything we know so far about OpenAI’s mysterious screenless AI device, reportedly codenamed “Sweetpea.” We cover who is behind it, what the leaks say, how Jony Ive’s design philosophy could shape the product, what the device might actually do, the major privacy concerns, and whether it can compete with Apple, Amazon, Google, Meta, and the smart speaker market.

Is this the next iPhone moment, or another overhyped AI gadget like the Humane AI Pin? Let’s break it down.

videos.title: Want to Skate Faster?
videos.summary_source_text:
Want to Skate Faster? If your shin angle isn’t right, you’re leaking speed. All squats in the world won’t change your stride mechanics. The best skaters get their knees over their toes creating the perfect forward shin angle to load the calf spring, allowing you to skate faster with less effort.

Most players stay too upright, making their strides weak, inefficient, and slower. 

Following Train 2.0 you learn proper skating education, how to load the calf spring for maximum pop, and the drills you need to better your mechanics.

Grab a club, put it across your shoulders, and practice that 90-degree rotation. Front foot lifts on the backswing, back foot lifts on the follow-through. Do 5 reps right now in your living room. This is the foundation everything else is built on.

videos.title: Most Golfers Focus On Impact... That's Why Driver Feels So Hard
videos.summary_source_text:
Most Golfers Focus On Impact... That's Why Driver Feels So Hard Most golfers are told that impact is all that matters in the golf swing. And while impact is certainly the most important moment, focusing on impact alone can actually make the driver swing feel much harder than it needs to be.

In this video, I'll show you why the backswing plays such a huge role in creating a great impact position and how a simple, efficient backswing can make the entire swing feel easier, more powerful and more consistent.

You'll learn:
✅ Why many golfers focus on the wrong part of the swing
✅ How the backswing influences everything that follows
✅ The key backswing movements that help create better impact automatically
✅ How to make your driver swing feel more natural and effortless
✅ Simple drills you can use to improve your backswing today

If you're struggling with consistency, distance, or simply feel like your driver swing requires too much effort, this video could completely change the way you think about your golf swing.

videos.title: How To Use Google Omni - Google Omni Tutorial
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Use Google Omni - Google Omni Tutorial Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google's Gemini Omni quietly fixes the most frustrating thing about AI video: ask for one small change and the whole clip regenerates into a different scene. Omni edits in place — character, voice, and continuity survive. In this breakdown I cover what Omni actually is, how its conversational editing works, the physics understanding behind it, where you use it (Flow, Gemini, YouTube Shorts), the real specs, and the pricing catch hiding in the free tier. No launch-day hype — just the honest signal on whether it belongs in your workflow.

videos.title: New TaylorMade Spider putters for 2026 - Full Line Up!
videos.summary_source_text:
New TaylorMade Spider putters for 2026 - Full Line Up! Guy puts the brand-new TaylorMade Spider Tour putter family to the test, taking a closer look at the all-new torched PVD finish and the four distinct models: Spider Tour, Spider Tour X, Spider Tour F and Spider Tour V. With input from some of the best players in the world, including Rory McIlroy and Scottie Scheffler, can the latest generation of Spider putters live up to the hype? Watch as Guy breaks down the technology, performance and feel to find out which Spider is right for your game. 


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: MAKING ADJUSTMENTS! Carolina Hurricanes Seeking to Even the Series on Thursday Night
videos.summary_source_text:
MAKING ADJUSTMENTS! Carolina Hurricanes Seeking to Even the Series on Thursday Night It's gameday once again as it's Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final. The Carolina Hurricanes will be looking to even the series 1-1 before it shifts to Las Vegas on Saturday. That said, what adjustments are the Hurricanes going to make? After learning what went wrong on Tuesday, how can they make those solutions and tweaks, then go take Game 2 at home? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes will make adjustments ahead of Game 2 Thursday night. While at the off-day media availability, a few players and Rod Brind'Amour mentioned making adjustments and having the confidence to win the next game. What are Zach's takeaways from those interactions? Secondly, Zach previews Game 2 as a whole by looking at what needs to happen overall if the Hurricanes want to even the series. What are some of the storylines heading into the game as well? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on which players to watch for the Hurricanes in Game 2. Who will continue to thrive and who needs to step up? What are some other keys to the game for the Hurricanes to even the series? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: YouTube Is Cracking Down On AI Slop
videos.summary_source_text:
YouTube Is Cracking Down On AI Slop BIG NEWS: YouTube is finally cracking down on AI generated videos.

Until now, creators had to manually check a box in the back end to disclose if their content was made with AI, but let’s be real…most people just didn’t do it. 

Now, YouTube is moving the AI disclosure label to a much more prominent position and introducing AUTOMATIC AI detection.

This is super interesting to me because a lot of times my YouTube video intros are made with AI, but the entire rest of the video doesn't. So I wonder if my videos get flagged automatically.

What do you guys think of this new update?

videos.summary_source_text:
Golf's Best Ball Striking Drill -This Has Helped Thousands Of Golfers! In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno demonstrates the exact golf drills he used to help his student reduce his handicap by 5 shots in under a month. Eric explains that keeping the arms straight and the elbows close together to create width, proper rotation and side bend in the golf swing helps guarantee better and more consistent ball striking with your irons.

👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

👕 Bobby Jones Apparel: https://bobbyjones.com/COGORNO   
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF

Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF

⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)


⏱️ TIMESTAMPS
🎯 0:25 - The fundamental issue: Creating wide arc vs narrow follow-through in the golf swing
💪 1:25 - First drill: Push butt of club away from body through impact 
🔧 3:53 - Arm mechanics: Straighten right arm and keep elbows together 
⚙️ 5:59 - Body rotation: Turn fully toward target for consistent contact 
🏋️ 8:22 – Extension in the follow through: Hips forward, chest up, head back positioning 
🎪 12:03 - Side bend in the golf swing: Maintaining distance to ground through impact 
📚 14:17 - Four-phase golf practice routine from no backswing to full swing 
🎨 16:58 - Clubface management: Controlling ball flight direction during practice 
🏆 17:45 - Results and wrap-up of the golf lesson

This detailed golf lesson demonstrates the fundamental importance of proper follow-through mechanics and provides a strategic method to achieve better ball striking with irons. Eric reveals how to compress your irons by focusing on four essential components: pushing the club away, body rotation, extension, and side bend in the golf swing. A straight left arm in golf swing combined with proper body positioning eliminate inconsistent contact and dramatically improve ball striking. These fundamental corrections using proven golf drills help golfers reduce handicap effectively through systematic practice.

What You'll Learn:
• How to create proper width in the follow-through by pushing the butt of golf club away from the body
• The four essential components for consistent iron contact and compression
• Body rotation techniques that allow arms to stay extended through impact
• How to extend with hips forward and chest up in the follow through
• Side bend in the golf swing to maintain consistent ground contact
• Four-phase practice routine progressing from no backswing to full swing
• Clubface management techniques to control ball flight direction

🌟10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4emUow7

videos.title: Are NEW 4x4s a WASTE OF MONEY?
videos.summary_source_text:
Are NEW 4x4s a WASTE OF MONEY? We’re putting a brand-new Toyota Land Cruiser up against a 15-year-old Range Rover to see which is the best off-road. 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-04-06

When it comes to off-roaders, few brands are doing it better than Toyota and Land Rover. The question is, does the all-new Land Cruiser have what it takes to beat a 15-year-old Range Rover over a series of off-road challenges?

To find out, let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

First off, we have the Land Cruiser, which is powered by a 2.8-litre 4-cylinder turbo diesel. This creates 204hp and 500Nm, with this power sent to all four wheels. It weighs in at 2,415kg, and as new it costs around £80,000. 

Then we come to the Range Rover - which is Sam’s own car! There’s a 3.6-litre twin-turbo V8 diesel under the bonnet, and this sends 272hp and 640Nm to all four wheels. It’s a fair bit heavier than the Toyota, weighing in at 2,642kg, but it’s a whole lot cheaper - Sam only paid £5,000 for it! 

Both cars come with several off-road features, but will the amount of tech in the Land Cruiser be too much for the Range Rover to match? Stick with Mat and Sam to see for yourself! 

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/racingdriver_sam/ for joining us for this video! We’re putting a brand-new Toyota Land Cruiser up against a 15-year-old Range Rover to see which is the best off-road. 

Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-04-06

Then we come to the Range Rover - which is Sam’s own car! There’s a 3.6-litre twin-turbo V8 diesel under the bonnet, and this sends 272hp and 640Nm to all four wheels. It’s a fair bit heavier than the Toyota, weighing in at 2,642kg, but it’s a whole lot cheaper - Sam only paid £5,000 for it! 

Both cars come with several off-road features, but will the amount of tech in the Land Cruiser be too much for the Range Rover to match? Stick with Mat and Sam to see for yourself! 

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/racingdriver_sam/ for joining us for this video!

videos.title: UK | 03.06.26 - RIFT Training
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 03.06.26 - RIFT Training 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

Hindi | 03.06.26 - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

videos.title: Jon Cooper Wins the Jack Adams Award. What's It Mean For Jared Bednar?
videos.summary_source_text:
Jon Cooper Wins the Jack Adams Award. What's It Mean For Jared Bednar? John Cooper snags the Jack Adams Award, but controversy rises as Lindy Ruff’s remarkable turnaround with the Buffalo Sabres is overlooked. Should the NHL honor overdue coaching excellence, or is the award reserved for this season’s true breakout? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson debate whether Cooper’s Tampa Bay Lightning tenure finally merited the trophy over Ruff’s miracle run and Dan Muse’s Pittsburgh Penguins surge, while pondering if Colorado Avalanche coach Jared Bednar is next in line.

The hosts break down tight voting margins, dissect Bednar’s long-term prospects, and discuss how GM shakeups could reshape award narratives. Shifting gears, they critique the NHL’s new All-Star Game format—with a five-minute, three-on-three round robin between national teams—and sound off on restricting the skills competition to players under 25. Will these changes spark fan engagement, or is it time to rethink the All-Star break altogether?

videos.title: An Easy Drill for Cleaner Chips #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
An Easy Drill for Cleaner Chips #golfswing #golftips If you struggle with inconsistent contact when chipping, this easy setup drill will change the way you strike the ball. Too many golfers lean back like they’re hitting a driver, which causes thin and heavy shots. Instead, set up normally, then slide your left hand down your right leg — this levels your shoulders and adds a touch more pressure to your lead side.
You’ll instantly feel a steeper setup and cleaner contact around the greens.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If you struggle with inconsistent contact when chipping, this easy setup drill will change the way you strike the ball. videos.title: Claude Code Worked All Night (No Human)
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Code Worked All Night (No Human) 👑 Premium Community: https://mrc.fm/premium

Last week I showed you tank. My self hosted mission control for Claude Code that runs entirely on my own server. This week I pushed it as far as it goes. I queued up real work, walked away, and let Claude Code build on my app all night long with zero human in the loop. No babysitting, no approving every step, no me. My agents run with permissions skipped and live in persistent tmux sessions, so they just keep going while I sleep and I woke up to features actually shipped, committed, and merged into my own Forgejo repo. In this video I walk through exactly what I set up what it built overnight. If you want the full tank source to try this yourself, it's in my premium community with the coupon code tank link above. Watch till the end before you trust an AI to code unsupervised through the night.

It contains minerals, trace elements, phytonutrients, and thousands of natural compounds that work together to support human health. The goal of eating is not simply to get enough calories, it's to provide the body with the complexity and nourishment that only real food can offer.

videos.title: Most Players Gas Themselves Because Their Stride Cadence Is Wrong
videos.summary_source_text:
Most Players Gas Themselves Because Their Stride Cadence Is Wrong The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Vår Tesla kostade 13 000 kr i månaden i värdeminskning
videos.summary_source_text:
Vår Tesla kostade 13 000 kr i månaden i värdeminskning Vi köpte en Tesla Model Y ny 2021 för 890 000 kronor och sålde den tre år senare för 420 000. Bara värdeminskningen blev ungefär 13 000 kronor i månaden. I det här klippet visar jag varför det inte är ett unikt misstag, utan ungefär vad en ny bil kostar.

Räknar man med allt (värdeminskning, alternativkostnad, service, skatt, parkering och alla småkostnader) landar de flesta nya bilar på 6 000 till 10 000 kronor i månaden. Även på en begagnad bil är det svårt att komma under 4 000 till 5 000. Vår gamla V70 var lika dyr att äga som den billiga Peugeot vi har nu.

Bilkalkylen vi använder finns för dig som är supporter på Patreon. Mer om bilekonomi finns på rikatillsammans.se och i RikaTillsammans-podden.

videos.title: You’re Rotating Too Soon  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
You’re Rotating Too Soon  #golfswing #golftips A lot of golfers start rotating their body too early in the downswing, which pulls the club over the top and makes the swing steep. When the arms don’t have time to drop, the path moves left and contact suffers. In this video we show how keeping your back facing the target for a little longer allows the body to shift and the club to shallow naturally. That sequence leads to better path, better strike, and better ball flight.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. A lot of golfers start rotating their body too early in the downswing, which pulls the club over the top and makes the swing steep. When the arms don’t have time to drop, the path moves left and contact suffers. videos.title: Jack Eichel Zone Entry Success
videos.summary_source_text:
Jack Eichel Zone Entry Success Everyone thinks Jack Eichel’s zone entries are all about speed, and it plays a role but it’s how he uses that speed that makes him so dangerous.

In this short, we break down three learnable mechanics that you can learn from Eichel to start having more successful zone entries:

1️⃣ Attack with speed - force defenders to back up before you cross the blue line, better to attack on angle.

2️⃣ Receive the puck in a crossunder - getting on an edge helps with pass reception and disguises your next move.

3️⃣As always, a wide stance for better balance, increased optionality and better puck protection mechanics. 

Master these, and you’ll start generating more zone entries. Visit our website to take your first steps to building these mechanics into your game next season.

GPT-5.6 Explained: 1.5 MILLION Tokens?! Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's posting "GPT-5.6 specs REVEALED" — leaked benchmarks, a 1.5 million token context window, a locked release date. One problem: OpenAI hasn't announced ANY of it. No blog post, no model card, no official numbers. So in this video we separate the signal from the hype: what OpenAI has genuinely shipped, what the leaks are actually pointing at, and how it stacks up against Anthropic's Claude.

By the end you'll know exactly where the rumor mill is guessing, where it's extrapolating from real patterns, and what any of this means if you actually use these tools for work.

We cover:
- The confirmed lineup — GPT-5, GPT-5.5, and GPT-5.5 Instant
- The hard line between official facts and Codex log leaks
- The 1.5M token context rumor (and why the direction matters more than the number)
- The Claude Opus 4.8 angle — capability vs. honesty
- A full spec comparison across GPT, Claude, and earlier models
- Realistic release timing, rollout path, and the risks nobody puts in the thumbnail

That's the BitBiased take — cut through the noise, keep the receipts.

videos.title: SO CLOSE! Carolina Hurricanes Drop Game 1 in a NINE Goal Battle
videos.summary_source_text:
SO CLOSE! Carolina Hurricanes Drop Game 1 in a NINE Goal Battle While the Carolina Hurricanes took a 2-0 lead in the first period, they ultimately lost Game 1, 5-4, to the Vegas Golden Knights. Despite the loss, the Hurricanes showed that they can beat these guys. Once they clean up the small mistakes, the Hurricanes will take some games from Vegas as the series goes on. What stood out in Game 1 to give the sense that the Hurricanes have a solid chance to even the series on Thursday night? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Game 1 as a whole. The third line led the way, scoring 3 of the 4 goals in Game 1. Nikolaj Ehlers scored two goals, giving the Hurricanes an early lead, and Jordan Staal scored the third goal for the line to tie it up. Even Shayne Gostisbehere got into the scoring. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how there are some positives to take away from the game. Despite the loss, the Hurricanes have what it takes to win some games in the Stanley Cup Final. Lastly, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on what was said postgame from Rod Brind'Amour, Gostisbehere, and Seth Jarvis. They gave some insight into the confidence of this team and how they will bounce back. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

If You Learn This You'll Play The Best Golf Of Your Life #shorts #golf #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno demonstrates the exact golf drills he used to help his student reduce his handicap by 5 shots in under a month. Eric explains that keeping the arms straight and the elbows close together to create width, proper rotation and side bend in the golf swing helps guarantee better and more consistent ball striking with your irons.

⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

This detailed golf lesson demonstrates the fundamental importance of proper follow-through mechanics and provides a strategic method to achieve better ball striking with irons. Eric reveals how to compress your irons by focusing on four essential components: pushing the club away, body rotation, extension, and side bend in the golf swing. A straight left arm in golf swing combined with proper body positioning eliminate inconsistent contact and dramatically improve ball striking. These fundamental corrections using proven golf drills help golfers reduce handicap effectively through systematic practice.

What You'll Learn:
• How to create proper width in the follow-through by pushing the butt of golf club away from the body
• The four essential components for consistent iron contact and compression
• Body rotation techniques that allow arms to stay extended through impact
• How to extend with hips forward and chest up in the follow through
• Side bend in the golf swing to maintain consistent ground contact
• Four-phase practice routine progressing from no backswing to full swing
• Clubface management techniques to control ball flight direction

videos.title: Signs Your Body Has Become Protective
videos.summary_source_text:
Signs Your Body Has Become Protective Sometimes the body becomes protective in ways that are easy to miss.
Bracing. Hesitation. Guarded movement. Disconnection. Difficulty trusting the body.
In this video, I explore some of the signs that your body may have become stuck in patterns of protection — and why recognizing them can be the first step toward meaningful change.
If this feels familiar and you’d like to explore this work more deeply, you’re welcome to book a one-on-one Zoom call with me here:
https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min
And if you’d like to begin with direct experience, I’ve created a free guided somatic session here:
https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
I help self-aware adults who are exhausted by recurring pain, tension, and fear cycles despite everything they’ve tried, and who are ready to stop chasing fixes and follow a deeper somatic, nervous-system-based path to lasting change, so they can trust their body again and fully live their life with ease, freedom, and confidence.

videos.title: Use the lead elbow to get better distance and control…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
Use the lead elbow to get better distance and control… Keeping the lead arm straight to long will give you all kinds of problems. Let it bend and the path of the club will become much better. #golftips #golfswing #pga 

0:00 Intro to when to bend your lead arm/elbow

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17 Keeping the lead arm straight to long will give you all kinds of problems. Let it bend and the path of the club will become much better. #golftips #golfswing #pga

videos.title: Fibromyalgia Is NOT in Your Head — Here's the REAL Cause
videos.summary_source_text:
Fibromyalgia Is NOT in Your Head — Here's the REAL Cause You’re not imagining your fibromyalgia pain or symptoms. Discover common fibromyalgia causes and triggers, and learn how to find fibromyalgia relief by addressing the underlying issue.

0:00 Introduction: Fibromyalgia explained 
0:42 Fibromyalgia causes and triggers 
1:45 Low vitamin D and fibromyalgia
3:19 Mitochondrial damage and fibromyalgia symptoms
5:00 What to do for fibromyalgia relief
5:31 Fibromyalgia research and recovery
7:58 Fixing low vitamin D 
8:39 Magnesium deficiency and fibromyalgia symptoms 
10:34 More fibromyalgia relief tips

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4u5mRuZ

Watch next for natural strategies to reduce inflammation and improve your health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/Ixf0DFExhq0
▶️ https://youtu.be/Sn7T46fCjLE

Read more about fibromyalgia causes and solutions here: https://drbrg.co/3PSFUuG

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Did you know that when antibodies from fibromyalgia patients were injected into healthy lab mice, those mice developed pain hypersensitivity?

Low vitamin D is very common in people with fibromyalgia. Vitamin D controls almost every part of your immune system, especially the natural killer cells. Fibromyalgia is an immune problem, so fixing a vitamin D deficiency can be one of the most powerful tools for mitigating fibromyalgia symptoms.

Fibromyalgia is also related to low magnesium, low zinc, and existing autoimmune diseases. 

If you have fibromyalgia, you must reestablish the proper fuel for your nerve cells. Ketones can bypass the damage and start feeding your neurons. Fasting has shown significant benefits for fibromyalgia relief and recovery. 

If you have fibromyalgia, prioritize rest over exercise and ensure you focus on increasing the right nutrients.

videos.title: What 67 Teaspoons of Sugar Does to Your Body
videos.summary_source_text:
What 67 Teaspoons of Sugar Does to Your Body Your blood sugar may look “normal” on a test… but that doesn’t mean your body is healthy.

🌟 Which of the 10 health signals are you missing? Take the 2-minute quiz to discover your #1 Health Lever: https://drbrg.co/48WVqfl

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

In this video, Dr. Berg reveals the shocking truth about how much hidden sugar the average person consumes every single day, not just from sweets, but from bread, pasta, cereal, crackers, waffles, pancakes, muffins, and other starches.

You’ll discover how insulin works like a vacuum cleaner to remove sugar from your blood, and why this process can silently damage your metabolism for 15–20 years before blood sugar problems finally appear.

Learn the early warning signs of insulin resistance, why “normal” blood sugar can be misleading, and what really happens inside your body when insulin stops working properly.

Watch until the end to understand the hidden process behind weight gain, fatigue, prediabetes, and type 2 diabetes.

videos.title: Böj den främre armen för bättre kontroll och längd…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Böj den främre armen för bättre kontroll och längd… Håll gärna den främre armen rak men inte för länge. Böj den i tid för bättre och längre slag. #golf #golftips #golflife 

0:00 Intro till när vi ska böja främre armen. 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Håll gärna den främre armen rak men inte för länge. Böj den i tid för bättre och längre slag. #golf #golftips #golflife

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

The BEST drivers I've ever tested 😳⛳️ Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

videos.title: Most powerful BMW M3 EVER v Audi R8 GT: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Most powerful BMW M3 EVER v Audi R8 GT: DRAG RACE It’s time for another head-to-head with the BMW M3 CS Touring going up against an Audi R8 GT! They’ll compete in a quarter-mile drag race, a half-mile rolling race, and a 100mph brake test - but which will come out on top?

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-0306

Does a high-performance wagon have what it takes to bring down one of the lightest, most recognisable supercars around? Well, to find out we’re putting the R8 GT up against a BMW M3 CS Touring! 

But just how different are these two high-performance beasts? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

First up we have the M3 CS Touring. Under the bonnet, it ‘only’ has a 3-litre twin-turbo straight-six, producing 550hp and 650Nm. Power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic gearbox, and as new it costs £120,600. It’s clearly the heavier of the two cars, weighing 1,850kg.

Then we come to the R8 GT. It’s powered by a naturally aspirated 5.2-litre V10, and this creates 620hp and 565Nm. However, unlike the M3 CS, it’s exclusively Rear Wheel Drive! But on the flip side, it’s a whole lot lighter than the BMW, weighing in at just 1,570kg! 

So the BMW can send power to all four wheels, but it’s almost 300kg heavier than the R8! Will weight prevail over AWD? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

New Audi S5 v Audi RS Legends: https://bit.ly/Audi-S5-v-Rivals It’s time for another head-to-head with the BMW M3 CS Touring going up against an Audi R8 GT! They’ll compete in a quarter-mile drag race, a half-mile rolling race, and a 100mph brake test - but which will come out on top?

Then we come to the R8 GT. It’s powered by a naturally aspirated 5.2-litre V10, and this creates 620hp and 565Nm. However, unlike the M3 CS, it’s exclusively Rear Wheel Drive! But on the flip side, it’s a whole lot lighter than the BMW, weighing in at just 1,570kg! 

So the BMW can send power to all four wheels, but it’s almost 300kg heavier than the R8! Will weight prevail over AWD? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!
